🏠Back Home

The Experience

An Interactive Holographic Love Letter

A living, responsive gift. A 3D card that tilts and shimmers under your fingers. Scenes that pop into a real interactive orchid. Music that feels present in the room. Particles that dance with your touch. This is a small digital world built to feel hand-written, intimate, and magical — the kind of thing you might keep on a shelf and open again on quiet nights.

Made as a personal gift for Janell, inspired by the quiet power of physical objects (holographic cards, living orchids, music that carries memory) and the joy of crafting something in code that still feels like a letter from one person to another.

What This Is

A collection of small, deliberate moments: the Hadacard (a holographic letter that opens to your touch), FrutigerScenes (a gentle visual novel that ends in a living 3D orchid), a music titlebar that feels like an old cassette, and responsive particles that make the space feel alive.

The Living Letter

The card responds to pointer and touch with real-time holographic foil, glitter, and gentle 3D tilt. It can be "closed" or opened wide into landscape. Every element (profile, candles, flowing text) is there to make it feel like a real object you are holding.

How the Magic is Made

Built with Astro for the quiet shell + Solid for the living parts, Three.js for the orchid, careful audio handoff, and a lot of love for glassmorphism, haptics, and handwriting fonts.

Tech: Astro • SolidJS • Three.js • Tailwind • Love

Live Reactions

Sparks Shared 142

Tap to add one. It only lives here for you.

Last unfolded just now • The letter is still warm

If this little world brought you a smile, you can keep the magic going.
